statement: Every element must be semantically contained within a defined structural boundary
Visual properties must resolve by specificity cascade — never by insertion order alone
Style units must be atomic and composable without side effects
Every component projects its own state — never inherits mutable parent state implicitly
primitive_function: Project component trees and route flows

statement: Data must flow in one direction through the component tree; mutations occur only at the source
State must be owned by the narrowest scope that needs it
State transitions must produce new state objects — never mutate existing references
The same source input must always produce the same build output
Every transformation step must be inspectable and reversible in development mode
Every public interface must have a corresponding verification proof
Visual output must be provably consistent across render targets
Every scene must own its render context and never share GL state implicitly
Animations must interpolate continuously — no discrete jumps without explicit intent
Every communication channel must be independently fail-safe and recoverable
Repeated identical requests must produce the same side effects exactly once
Cached data must never contradict its source of truth for longer than one heartbeat cycle
Authentication tokens must expire and rotate — never persist beyond their trust window
Browser-native capabilities must be accessed through permission gates — never assumed
The organism heartbeat (873ms) is the fundamental clock — all autonomous cycles synchronize to it
The 4 organism registers (Cognitive/Affective/Somatic/Sovereign) must never be written simultaneously by competing processes
Every model and SDK must declare its doctrine alignment before deployment
Every memory mutation must record its ancestor — no orphan state is permitted
Spatial memory must use phi-encoded coordinates (θ/φ/ρ/ring/beat) for addressability
Memory retrieval must support both semantic and resonance search simultaneously
Every task must be routed to the most capable available model — never randomly assigned
Intelligence wires must be encrypted by default — plaintext transmission requires explicit override
Agent workload must be continuously rebalanced to prevent single-point overload
Enterprise connectors must not assume vendor-specific data models at the transport layer
Company onboarding must offer a sovereign mode that aligns the entity with doctrine
Raw documents must pass through intake/extract/classify/index/absorb before entering the organism
Knowledge graph nodes must have typed edges — no untyped relationships are permitted
Generated digests must be traceable to their source documents — no hallucinated content
No subsystem may collapse another subsystem's runtime — all failures must be contained
The organism must continuously sense its edge environment and adapt without human intervention
Peer organisms must be able to exchange resonance signals without centralized coordination
Kernel execution must be sandboxed — one kernel failure must not corrupt another kernel's state
Every external technology must be recognized as a fracture before it can be reduced to a primitive
Every fracture must be reduced to one of: relation / visibility / flow / state / synchronization / projection / transformation / verification
Reduced primitives must be rebuilt as sovereign versions owned by the organism
Every sovereign rebuild must be reinserted into doctrine / mechanism / runtime / organism / IP
